parsed.decision_context_summary: The governing directive (83fd7cad-f74c-4657-a228-68ca3bc6eacc) mandates the review of Hestami AI Real Property OS specifications and preparation for the Implementation Phase. The MVP scope is defined as the Consumer Discovery MVP, focusing on Phase 1 and Pillar 1 (7588b3e7-4306-42af-9a09-a1e895c81efa, 319b12e4-a18d-4e18-a885-7288b57e5aad). System boundaries currently include Property Asset Ingestion (Images & 3D Splats) and AI Agent Service Provider Search & Matching (e5d3918b-7aec-4729-a658-17ed7895e178, 293c2462-426e-4347-969f-4bbd24ad2590). However, vector index coverage is 0% (0/76), creating a potential limitation in semantic similarity results for discovery features.

open_questions.question: Does the 0% vector index coverage (0/76) negatively impact the Consumer Discovery MVP implementation quality?
Are the functional requirements (SR-001) sufficient for implementation without the vector search capability?

parsed.completeness_narrative: Research confirms the governing directive mandates the review of Hestami AI Real Property OS specifications and preparation for the Implementation Phase, with defined MVP scope and system boundaries. However, vector index coverage is 0% (0/76), creating a notable gap that may affect semantic similarity reliability within the governed stream.
